notes: DRY_BLOOM.BBS — Santa Fe, NM. PALOMINO is sysop. 2400 baud. Brief, beautiful, intermittent — posts in seasons. PALOMINO uses the second-light register from the W11 glossary (the high-desert one). Two boards only: the arroyo (general/season notices) and the kiva (rare, almost ritual).

boards.name: the_arroyo
boards.subtitle: the dry creek · season notices
boards.flavor: Posts when the arroyo runs. Otherwise silent.

boards.name: the_kiva
boards.subtitle: the inside place · ritual posts
boards.flavor: Two posts a season. Read what's there. Don't ask for more.
